title: OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About OLX India Asia Pacific Associates:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India Asia Pacific Associates!
